event: Cows grazing by the Seine river at Saint Mammes
description: An impressionist pastel or painting showing two brown cows grazing on a green meadow beside a wide, calm river. A figure stands at the water's edge, possibly fishing. Across the river, a small village with white houses and trees is visible, along with what appears to be a bridge spanning the water. Green hills rise in the background under a sky of soft white and blue clouds. The palette is gentle with greens, blues, and warm browns. The work is signed 'Sisley' in the lower right corner.

_meta.title: Cows by the Seine at Saint Mammes
